title: Airstrikes, turmoil in Strait of Hormuz imperil ceasefire with Iran
summary_full: Iran accused the U.S. and Israel of violating the truce and threatened to withdraw from negotiations. Israeli attacks in Lebanon were a major point of dispute.
summary_public: Iran accused the U.S. and Israel of violating the truce and threatened to withdraw from negotiations. Israeli attacks in Lebanon were a major point of dispute.
